title: Finaax Capital Advisors Private Limited
description: Finaax Capital Advisors is a SEBI-registered Category-1 Merchant Banker providing bespoke financial solutions. We specialize in strategic fundraising, IPO management, corporate restructuring, and valuations to empower business growth and potential.
meta_title: Finaax Capital Advisors | SEBI Registered Category-1 Merchant Banker
meta_desc: Finaax Capital Advisors is a SEBI registered Category-1 Merchant Banker providing expertise in IPO management
faqs: [{"question":"Is Finaax Capital Advisors a SEBI-authorized entity?","answer":"Yes, Finaax Capital Advisors Private Limited is a SEBI-registered Category-1 Merchant Banker, which allows us to act as Lead Managers for public issues and provide professional capital market services."},{"question":"What core services does the firm offer?","answer":"Our expertise spans Strategic Fundraising (IPOs, FPOs, Rights Issues), Mergers & Acquisitions, Corporate Restructuring, Business Valuations, and comprehensive Corporate Advisory services."},{"question":"Does Finaax Capital specialize in SME IPOs?","answer":"Yes, we have significant experience in the SME segment, acting as Book Running Lead Managers (BRLM) to help emerging companies list on the BSE SME and NSE EMERGE platforms."},{"question":"Is the Lead Manager responsible for post-listing share price?","answer":"No. After listing, the share price depends on Market demand and supply, Company performance and Overall market conditions The Lead Manager\u2019s role largely ends after listing."},{"question":"What are the merchant banker fees of Finaax Capital Advisors Private?","answer":"Generally, the merchant banker fee or IPO cost is 8-12% of the issue size, though it may vary according to the IPO."}]
